prompt_task: From the given GTF MANE.GRCh38.v1.3.refseq_genomic.gtf.gz, report the median 5' UTR, CDS, and 3' UTR lengths (use numpy median function, rounded down to nearest integer). Only consider MANE Select transcripts and those on standard chromosomes. Consider stop codon as part of CDS. Return a semicolon separated string with no space, e.g. "45;551;23". Run the analysis inside the Galaxy environment.
